scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 10000 --reload"
scripts.backend: cd backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 10000 --reload
